title: How I used ChatGPT to optimize my day trading workflow (100+ sessions)
author: Own_Statement_6207
selftext:
Over the past few months, I’ve been building a structured workflow with ChatGPT:
– Planning pre-market
– Logging emotions and setups
– Backtesting ideas with prompt chains

I ended up creating 100+ prompts from my personal trading routine.

Not here to brag — just wondering, has anyone else tried this approach with AI tools?

If there’s interest, I’m happy to share the book just (DM me).

comments.author: Legouzi6913
comments.body: Interesting !! I also tried this by using Perplexity in parallel to survey the markets. In the end it crashes each time the task is launched and requires me to repeatedly do reminders because it makes mistakes. I will be very curious to see your approach

comments.author: No-Republic6926
comments.body: Can you DM your prompt list bro

comments.author: Denis_Vo
comments.body: Yeah.. I have started a service that uses a similar idea.. but with main focus on the psychological aspects.The problem with pure ChatGPT or other solutions is that we have Everytime feed it with the data and correct context.
